inputs.label: Building Value (TL)
inputs.businessContext: Total value of the building to be insured

businessContext_i18n.en: Total value of the building to be insured.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Valeur totale du bâtiment à assurer
businessContext_i18n.es: Valor total del edificio a asegurar

inputs.label: Earthquake Zone Coefficient
inputs.businessContext: Risk coefficient according to the earthquake zone where the building is located (0.5-2.0)

businessContext_i18n.en: Risk coefficient based on the earthquake zone of the building (0.5-2.0).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Binanın bulunduğu deprem bölgesine göre risk katsayısı (0.5-2.0)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coefficient de risque selon la zone sismique du bâtiment (0,5-2,0)
businessContext_i18n.es: Coeficiente de riesgo según la zona sísmica del edificio (0.5-2.0)
businessContext_i18n.ar: معامل المخاطرة حسب منطقة الزلازل التي يقع فيها المبنى (0.5-2.0)

inputs.label: Building Type Coefficient
inputs.businessContext: Risk coefficient according to the building material and structural system (reinforced concrete=1.0, steel=0.8, wood=1.5, etc.)

businessContext_i18n.en: Risk coefficient based on building material and structural system (reinforced concrete=1.0, steel=0.8, wood=1.5, etc.).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Binanın yapı malzemesi ve taşıyıcı sistemine göre risk katsayısı (betonarme=1.0, çelik=0.8, ahşap=1.5, vs.)
businessContext_i18n.de: Risikokoeffizient nach Baumaterial und Tragsystem des Gebäudes (Stahlbeton=1,0, Stahl=0,8, Holz=1,5 usw.)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coefficient de risque selon le matériau et le système porteur (béton armé=1,0, acier=0,8, bois=1,5, etc.)
businessContext_i18n.es: Coeficiente de riesgo según material y sistema estructural del edificio (hormigón armado=1.0, acero=0.8, madera=1.5, etc.)
businessContext_i18n.ar: معامل المخاطرة حسب مادة البناء والنظام الإنشائي (خرسانة مسلحة=1.0، فولاذ=0.8، خشب=1.5، إلخ)

inputs.label: Building Age (years)
inputs.businessContext: The age of the building affects the wear and durability factor

businessContext_i18n.en: Building age affects wear and durability factor
businessContext_i18n.tr: Binanın yaşı, yıpranma ve dayanıklılık faktörüne etki eder
businessContext_i18n.de: Alter des Gebäudes, beeinflusst Abnutzung und Haltbarkeitsfaktor
businessContext_i18n.fr: Âge du bâtiment, influence l'usure et la durabilité
businessContext_i18n.es: La edad del edificio afecta el desgaste y el factor de durabilidad
businessContext_i18n.ar: عمر المبنى، يؤثر على عامل التآكل والمتانة

inputs.label: Deductible Rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: The rate the insured will cover in case of damage, reflected in premium discount

businessContext_i18n.en: Rate covered by the insured in case of damage, reflected in premium discount
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hasar durumunda sigortalının karşılayacağı oran, prim indirimine yansır
businessContext_i18n.de: Vom Versicherungsnehmer im Schadensfall zu tragender Anteil, wirkt sich auf den Prämienrabatt aus
businessContext_i18n.fr: Part à la charge de l'assuré en cas de sinistre, réduit la prime
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje que el asegurado cubre en caso de daño, afecta el descuento en la prima
businessContext_i18n.ar: النسبة التي يتحملها المؤمن له في حالة الضرر، تنعكس على خصم القسط

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
